headline: T-Mobile is booting customers from its oldest plans
summary: T-Mobile is retiring many legacy plans, including some dating back to the 3G era. Affected customers will be moved onto current rate plans. The change has sparked significant customer dissatisfaction and complaints online.

headline: DC's new cinematic universe is already slowing down
summary: Warner Bros. Discovery's new DC cinematic universe plans are reportedly facing early challenges. The fast-tracked Supergirl standalone film after Superman raises concerns about the franchise's direction. Critics question the strategy of expanding with another Kryptonian feature so soon.

headline: Leaked iPhone 18 Pro photos reportedly wound up on the dark web
summary: Photos and parts lists for the iPhone 18 Pro have reportedly appeared on the dark web. The leak follows a data breach at a key Apple supplier, according to Reuters. Images show a three-camera layout and the Apple logo on a device claimed to be the iPhone 18 Pro.

headline: Tidal won't pay royalties on AI-generated music but isn't banning it outright
summary: Tidal has announced new policies regarding AI-generated music, focusing on artist protection and listener information. Starting July 15th, tracks identified as 100% AI-generated will receive a specific label. These AI-generated tracks will no longer be monetizable on the platform.

headline: Persona Live-Action TV Show in the Works at Netflix
summary: A live-action TV show based on the popular Persona video game franchise is reportedly in development. Netflix is the streaming service rumored to be producing the adaptation. This marks a significant expansion for the beloved RPG series into television.

headline: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 Teaser Features Cyberpunk 2077 Locations
summary: The first teaser for Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 has been released, exciting fans. Viewers have already identified several iconic locations from Cyberpunk 2077 in the teaser footage. These recognizable settings are expected to be featured prominently in the new season.

headline: The 10 Most Anticipated TV Shows to Stream in July
summary: A list of the 10 most anticipated TV shows set to stream in July has been compiled. The selection includes a wide array of genres, from caped crusaders to multiversal collapses. Expect to see everything from superhero epics to stories about washed-up golfers.

headline: Why Evo Champion MenaRD Switched Characters in Street Fighter 6 Finals
summary: Back-to-back Street Fighter 6 Evo Champion MenaRD made a surprising character switch in the tournament finals. The decision came during the highest-stakes matches, diverging from his usual main. MenaRD provided insights into his strategic choice to change characters.

headline: UK's Long-Delayed Defence Spending Plan to Focus on Drone Warfare
summary: The UK's long-delayed defence investment plan is scheduled for publication on Tuesday. The plan will detail how billions will be spent to equip the UK Armed Forces. A key focus of the strategy is expected to be on advancements in drone warfare.

headline: New 'No 10 North' Plan to Rebalance Power in Britain, Burnham Promises
summary: Andy Burnham, a leading political figure, promises a new 'No 10 North' plan to rebalance power in Britain. The devolution plans aim to drive economic growth and opportunities across all regions. He asserts his proposals would foster 'good growth in every postcode' throughout the country.

headline: Chris Mason: Burnham Revels on Public Stage But Lacks Time for Ideas
summary: Political editor Chris Mason observes Andy Burnham's public persona and ambitions. Burnham, who has long harbored prime ministerial aspirations, enjoys the public spotlight. However, Mason notes that Burnham may have limited time to fully develop and solidify his policy ideas.

headline: Refugees to Repay £10,000 Under New UK Asylum Rules
summary: New asylum rules in the UK will require refugees to repay approximately £10,000 for support received. Ministers will be granted new powers to recover these costs from adults who have received asylum support. These laws introduce significant financial obligations for asylum seekers.
